c.d: How effectively the app shuffles music tracks to avoid repetition and provide a true random or intelligent shuffle experience
Capabilities to create, edit, and manage playlists including folder-based, linked, or smart playlists
Range of music sources supported such as local files, cloud streams (OneDrive, Google Drive), YouTube, or integrated streaming services
Responsiveness and adaptability of the UI to different device types like phones and tablets
Inclusion of advanced features like Smart Shuffle, AI-based music recommendations, or Hot or Not mode to interactively select songs
Average user rating to assess user satisfaction
